'''wanïfpïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherboard|featherboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherboard|featherboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| wanïfpïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || wanïfpïfth || wanïfpïfj || wanïfpïfsh || wanïfpïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || wanïfnïfpïfth || wanïfnïfpïfj || wanïfnïfpïfsh || wanïfnïfpïf
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || wanïfpïfïf || wanïfpïfïf || wanïfpïfïf || wanïfpïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || wanïfpïfth || wanïfpïfj || wanïfpïfsh || wanïfpïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || wanïfpïfïfl || wanïfpïfïfl || wanïfpïfïfl || wanïfpïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || wanïfpïfïfïf || wanïfpïfïfïf || wanïfpïfïfïf || wanïfpïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || wanïfpïfïfn || wanïfpïfïfn || wanïfpïfïfn || wanïfpïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || wanïfpïfïforo || wanïfpïfïforo || wanïfpïfïforo || wanïfpïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|086b4c8}}
